headline_no: 2025 er altså ikke Assads år, men det kan bli Syrias
headline_en: 2025 is not Assad’s year, but it could be Syria’s
lead_en: The columnist reflects on the fall of Assad’s regime and argues that 2025 could become a turning point for Syria if reconstruction and political stabilization succeed.
justification: The article is primarily about Syria’s war, regime collapse, sanctions, and the international conditions for reconstruction, which fits security/foreign policy most closely.

headline_no: Tonje Brenna vil øke aldersgrensen i hele arbeidslivet til 72 år
headline_en: Tonje Brenna wants to raise the age limit across working life to 72
lead_en: Labour Minister Tonje Brenna wants the upper age limit in all parts of the labour market raised to 72, so employers cannot dismiss workers solely because of age before then.
justification: The article is mainly about pensions, working longer, and labour-market rules tied to welfare and public services, with Labour framed as advancing a broadly supported reform.

headline_no: Kaller utviklingen tilhøyre og Ap for oppsiktsvekkende
headline_en: Calls the development for the Conservatives and Labour remarkable
lead_en: A new polling average shows historically weak combined support for Labour and the Conservatives, highlighting growing party fragmentation ahead of Norway’s September election.
justification: The article is mainly about party support, polling trends, and electoral fragmentation rather than a specific policy issue, so it fits governance and political competition.

headline_no: Frp vil sende alle asylsøkere til Rwanda
headline_en: The Progress Party wants to send all asylum seekers to Rwanda
lead_en: The Progress Party wants Norway to pursue a Rwanda-style asylum deal so that asylum seekers granted protection would be sent there instead of being allowed to stay in Norway.
justification: The article primarily concerns asylum policy, immigration control, and integration, while also presenting the Labour government as not pursuing the tougher approach Frp advocates.

headline_no: Kraftig vind og halvmeter snø på Østlandet
headline_en: Strong winds and half a meter of snow in Eastern Norway
lead_en: Authorities warn of major snowfall and strong winds in the Oslo area, with likely traffic disruption, train cancellations, and difficult travel conditions.
justification: The article is a weather and transport disruption report, which does not fit the main election issue categories and is therefore coded as other.

headline_no: Slik kan sovestillingen din gi bedre helse og søvnkvalitet
headline_en: How your sleeping position can improve your health and sleep quality
lead_en: Different sleeping positions can either relieve or worsen health problems, and experts say the best position depends on the person’s condition.
justification: The article is a health and lifestyle piece about sleep, pain, and medical conditions, so it fits the health category.

headline_no: Kong Frederiks nye våpenskjold sender et signal til Trump
headline_en: King Frederik’s new coat of arms sends a signal to Trump
lead_en: Denmark’s new king has unveiled a revised coat of arms that gives greater prominence to Greenland and the Faroe Islands, which experts see as a signal about the unity of the Danish realm.
justification: The article is mainly about Greenland, Trump, and the international-security significance of Danish sovereignty, making security/foreign policy the dominant issue.

headline_no: Bane Nors reserveløsning er vanlige mobiltelefoner
headline_en: Bane Nor’s backup solution is ordinary mobile phones
lead_en: After a nationwide train shutdown caused by failure in the rail radio system, Aftenposten reports that Bane Nor’s fallback plan relies on regular mobile phones rather than a separate backup network.
justification: The article is mainly about railway infrastructure and emergency communication failures, which does not fit the main campaign issue categories and is therefore coded as other.

headline_no: Jernbanetilsynet skal granske togstansen 1. juledag
headline_en: The Railway Authority will investigate the train shutdown on Christmas Day
lead_en: Norway’s Railway Authority is launching a broad investigation into the nationwide train stoppage on Christmas Day, focusing on what failed, how it was handled, and how vulnerability can be reduced.
justification: The article is mainly about transport-system failure and regulatory oversight of the rail shutdown, which falls outside the main election issue categories and is therefore coded as other.

headline_no: I 15 år prøvde filosofiprofessoren å finne svaret på meningen med livet
headline_en: For 15 years, the philosophy professor tried to find the answer to the meaning of life
lead_en: A philosophy professor argues that meaning in life comes from improving things, and says purpose grows out of commitment, projects, and human relationships rather than pleasure.
justification: The article centers on mental well-being, purpose, and psychological health, so health is the closest fit even though it is also a broader lifestyle/philosophy feature.

headline_no: Skjebneår for Palestina?
headline_en: A decisive year for Palestine?
lead_en: The columnist argues that 2025 could become a turning point in which international support for Palestinian statehood is stronger than ever, yet still fails to prevent further territorial loss and political defeat.
justification: The article is primarily about Palestine, Gaza, Israeli policy, and international mobilization around the Palestinian cause, which fits the Gaza/Palestine category most directly.

headline_no: Nav stanset dagpengene fordi han var meddommer
headline_en: Nav stopped his unemployment benefits because he served as a lay judge
lead_en: A man lost his unemployment benefits after serving for more than five weeks as a lay judge, exposing how Nav’s old rules treated that duty as work and cut off payments.
justification: The article is mainly about unemployment benefits and welfare-system rules, while also noting that Labour minister Tonje Brenna moved to change the regulation.

headline_no: Prisen for å kaste ut ulovlige immigranter kan bli astronomisk
headline_en: The price of deporting undocumented immigrants could be astronomical
lead_en: The article examines Donald Trump’s plan for mass deportations and argues that removing millions of undocumented immigrants from the United States would be extremely expensive and economically disruptive.
justification: The primary focus is immigration enforcement and deportation policy in the United States, with major economic costs and labour-market effects as a secondary issue.

headline_no: Grufulle detaljerom Assads torturregime blir nå avslørt
headline_en: Grisly details of Assad’s torture regime are now being revealed
lead_en: Former prisoners in Syria are now speaking openly about torture, mass detention, and killings under Assad, as investigators begin documenting evidence after the regime’s fall.
justification: The article is primarily about the Syrian conflict, state repression, and its international accountability context, which fits security/foreign affairs most closely.

headline_no: Fem år siden koronautbruddet: Kineserne ante ugler i mosen.
headline_en: Five years since the coronavirus outbreak: The Chinese sensed something was wrong
lead_en: Five years after the first official Covid-19 death, the article argues that China knew early that the outbreak could become serious but still has not shared all the data needed to clarify how the pandemic began.
justification: The article is primarily about the origins of Covid-19, pandemic transparency, and public health consequences, making health the dominant issue.

headline_no: Rundt 60 personer avhørt i saken mot Høiby
headline_en: Around 60 people questioned in the case against Høiby
lead_en: Police have interviewed about 60 people and collected extensive digital evidence as the investigation into the criminal case against Marius Borg Høiby nears completion.
justification: The article is primarily a crime and legal-process report about a criminal investigation, which falls outside the main election issue categories and is therefore coded as other.

headline_no: Det er ingen tvil om at Oslo trenger flere boliger. Men det er ikke sikkert skogen er svaret.
headline_en: There is no doubt that Oslo needs more housing. But the forest is not necessarily the answer.
lead_en: The commentary argues that although Oslo needs more homes, building massive housing developments in Sørkedalen is unlikely to be a practical or attractive solution to the city’s housing crisis.
justification: The article is primarily about housing supply, prices, and the economics of urban development in Oslo, with land-use and environmental concerns as a secondary issue.

headline_no: Mener badstuene kan gi helseplager
headline_en: Says the saunas may cause health problems
lead_en: A new report finds that smoke from Oslo’s wood-fired floating saunas worsens local air quality and may create health risks, prompting the city government to review the issue.
justification: The article focuses on air pollution and possible health effects from sauna smoke, making health the primary issue with environmental pollution as a secondary dimension.

headline_no: Skru av blitzen, og si unnskyld
headline_en: Turn off the flash, and apologize
lead_en: The commentator argues that restaurant guests should show consideration and that using bright lights for food photos can ruin the dining experience for others.
justification: The article is a cultural/lifestyle commentary about restaurant etiquette and influencer behavior, which does not fit the main political issue categories.

headline_no: Bunnår for ny kraftproduksjon
headline_en: Rock-bottom year for new power production
lead_en: New power production in Norway fell to an extremely low level in 2024, prompting warnings from business and climate groups that the country risks higher prices and weaker progress on green industry and climate goals.
justification: The article primarily concerns electricity supply and power shortages as an economic problem for prices and industry, with climate and renewable expansion as a clear secondary issue.

headline_no: Disse kan stoppe oppgradering av kraftverk
headline_en: These could stop the upgrading of power plants
lead_en: A major hydropower upgrade project in Røldal-Suldal faces opposition from county governors who say the impact on wild reindeer is too great, while Høyre argues the extra power should be prioritized.
justification: The article is primarily about the trade-off between renewable energy expansion and environmental protection, especially impacts on nature and wild reindeer, with electricity supply as a secondary issue.

headline_no: Legen tok en gentest. – Jeg tok det enormt hardt.
headline_en: The doctor took a genetic test. “I took it extremely hard.”
lead_en: A doctor describes going into crisis after a DNA test revealed a high genetic risk for Alzheimer’s, highlighting how difficult such information can be to process personally.
justification: The article is primarily about genetic testing, Alzheimer’s risk, and the psychological and medical implications of health information, so it fits the health category.

headline_no: Gode råd for effektiv rengjøring
headline_en: Good advice for effective cleaning
lead_en: A cleaning expert shares practical tips on commonly overlooked household items and explains how often things like sofas and bath mats should be cleaned.
justification: The article is mainly a household cleaning and lifestyle guide, which does not fit the main political issue categories, though hygiene is a minor secondary element.

headline_no: Hørt om «TL; DR»? Universitetslærere slår alarm.
headline_en: Heard of “TL;DR”? University teachers are sounding the alarm.
lead_en: University teachers report that students are increasingly avoiding long reading assignments and relying on summaries and videos instead, raising concerns about attention, effort, and academic reading habits.
justification: The article is mainly about higher education and students’ reading ability, which fits best under public services/education, with a broader cultural-research angle as secondary.

headline_no: Ferdig skamma
headline_en: Done with shame
lead_en: The columnist argues that Trump’s appeal is tied to shamelessness and to voters’ rejection of moralizing elites, especially in the wake of the U.S. election.
justification: The article is mainly an analysis of Trump, voter behavior, and election dynamics rather than a specific policy area, so it fits governance and political competition.

section_no: Nyheter | Nyheter | Donald Trumps Andre Periode
headline_no: Farage: – Hvis jeg bodde på Grønland, vet jeg hva jeg ville valgt
headline_en: Farage: “If I lived in Greenland, I know what I would choose”
lead_en: Nigel Farage says Greenland could benefit from closer ties with the United States and urges Norway to engage openly with Trump’s incoming administration.
justification: The article focuses mainly on Greenland, U.S. relations, and Norway’s positioning toward the Trump administration, making security/foreign policy the dominant issue.

headline_no: Ni ting han har lovet å gjøre på dag én
headline_en: Nine things he has promised to do on day one
lead_en: The article reviews Donald Trump’s main first-day promises as president, including mass deportations, border measures, pardons, and reversing parts of Biden-era policy.
justification: The article is primarily about Trump’s governing agenda, executive actions, and presidential power, with immigration as a major secondary policy area.

headline_no: Vil Trump forsvare Taiwan?
headline_en: Will Trump defend Taiwan?
lead_en: The article examines uncertainty over whether Donald Trump would defend Taiwan if China attacked, as Chinese military pressure and espionage against the island intensify.
justification: The article is primarily about Taiwan, China, U.S. commitments, and the risk of conflict, which clearly places it in security/foreign policy.

headline_no: Håper Trump vil redde Tiktok
headline_en: Hopes Trump will save TikTok
lead_en: TikTok has been shut down in the United States, and users are now hoping Donald Trump will help restore access, while the fallout could also affect creators and audiences in Norway.
justification: The article is primarily about U.S.-China tensions, national-security concerns over TikTok, and the political handling of the app ban, with broader governance implications.

headline_no: Jo, folk flest fikk bedre råd i fjor
headline_en: Yes, most people were better off financially last year
lead_en: The commentator argues that despite higher housing costs, most Norwegians gained purchasing power in 2024 because income growth outpaced overall price growth.
justification: The article is primarily about purchasing power, inflation, wages, interest costs, and household finances, which fits the economy/cost-of-living category.

headline_no: I to år jaktet hun på «Anna», som har tystet på 1400 russere
headline_en: For two years, she hunted “Anna,” who informed on 1,400 Russians
lead_en: A researcher spent two years uncovering the identity of a prolific war informant whose denunciations helped punish Russians accused of criticizing the war in Ukraine.
justification: The article is primarily about repression linked to Russia’s war in Ukraine and the security-state climate surrounding anti-war dissent, with governance as a secondary aspect.

headline_no: Tre kvinnelige gisler endelig fri fra Hamas-fangenskap etter 15 måneder
headline_en: Three female hostages finally freed from Hamas captivity after 15 months
lead_en: On the first day of the ceasefire, Hamas released three Israeli women held hostage in Gaza, while Israel prepared to free 90 Palestinian prisoners in return.
justification: The article is primarily about the Gaza war, hostage releases, prisoner exchanges, and the ceasefire process, which fits the Gaza/Palestine category most directly.

headline_no: Harald Stanghelle: Frykt for at pustepausen fra krigens inferno blir kort
headline_en: Harald Stanghelle: Fear that the respite from the inferno of war will be short
lead_en: The commentator welcomes the Gaza ceasefire but argues that it is fragile, with strong reasons to fear that both Israel and Hamas could return to war after the initial pause.
justification: The article is primarily about the Gaza ceasefire, Hamas, Israel, and the risk of renewed war, which fits the Gaza/Palestine category most directly.

headline_no: Frank Rossavik: Veganerne kjemper for statsstøtte som livssynssamfunn. Kan de holdes utenfor den lukrative pengepotten?
headline_en: Frank Rossavik: Vegans are fighting for state support as a worldview community. Can they be kept out of the lucrative funding pot?
lead_en: The commentary examines whether the Norwegian Vegan Society can qualify as a worldview community and thereby gain access to public funding, ceremonial rights, and legal recognition.
justification: The article is mainly about state recognition, legal criteria, and public funding for organizations, which makes governance the best fit.

headline_no: Nåmøter drapstiltalte i retten
headline_en: Now the murder suspect appears in court
lead_en: The trial is beginning for the British teenager accused of killing three girls in Southport, in a case that also fueled riots after false claims spread that the attacker was a Syrian asylum seeker.
justification: The article centers on a murder trial but also strongly emphasizes how false claims about an asylum seeker fueled anti-immigration unrest, making immigration/integration/crime the closest fit.

headline_no: Forvirret fra Bergstø
headline_en: Confused message from Bergstø
lead_en: SV leader Kirsti Bergstø debated with Jonas Gahr Støre and Sylvi Listhaug about how Norway should handle Donald Trump’s return to the White House. The commentary argues that her positions on NATO, the U.S., the EU, and trade are contradictory and not in Norway’s interest.
justification: The article is primarily about Norway’s security and foreign-policy orientation toward the U.S., NATO, and Europe under Trump, while secondarily touching on party leadership and political positioning.

headline_no: Likestilling har handlet mye om likhet. Endrer dette seg?
headline_en: Equality has largely been about sameness. Is that changing?
lead_en: A new study suggests young women and men in Norway hold more conservative views on gender roles, but the commentator argues this does not mean support for equality is weakening. Instead, she says younger people may be adopting a more nuanced view focused on equal rights rather than identical choices.
justification: The article is primarily a broader social commentary on gender equality attitudes in Norway rather than on one of the specified election issue categories.

headline_no: Håper på gledeshistorier fra Gaza
headline_en: Hoping for uplifting stories from Gaza
lead_en: As the ceasefire between Israel and Hamas begins, Norwegian aid and medical workers hope they can finally enter Gaza under safer conditions and bring in badly needed assistance. The article focuses on the huge humanitarian needs, medical evacuations, and fragile hopes for relief.
justification: The article is primarily about Gaza and the humanitarian consequences of the war, with a secondary focus on medical care and emergency health needs.

headline_no: Tror på bedre økonomi med Trumps politikk
headline_en: Believes Trump’s policies will improve the economy
lead_en: In heavily pro-Trump West Virginia, several residents who depend on public support still believe Donald Trump’s return will improve the U.S. economy. The article explores poverty, welfare dependence, and expectations that his policies will bring change.
justification: The article is primarily about economic hardship, welfare dependence, and expectations for improvement under Trump’s economic policies, with a secondary connection to health and social support services.

headline_no: Joe Biden delte ut «frikort» mot fremtidig rettsforfølgelse
headline_en: Joe Biden handed out “free passes” against future prosecution
lead_en: In one of his final acts as president, Joe Biden granted pre-emptive pardons to figures such as Anthony Fauci, Mark Milley, and members of the January 6 committee. The move may complicate Donald Trump’s stated ambitions to pursue political opponents and critics.
justification: The article is primarily about presidential power, political retaliation, and institutional leadership in the U.S., rather than a specific policy domain.

headline_no: Vestre og Brenna slår ring om Støre
headline_en: Vestre and Brenna rally around Støre
lead_en: Labour deputy leaders Jan Christian Vestre and Tonje Brenna publicly back Jonas Gahr Støre as party leader and prime minister ahead of the election campaign. The article also reports Labour’s new promises on electricity support and lower grid charges as part of its election platform.
justification: The article is primarily about Labour’s leadership, internal party unity, and election positioning around Støre, with a secondary focus on cost-of-living and electricity policy.

headline_no: Enorm Frp-oppslutning i LO
headline_en: Huge support for the Progress Party in LO
lead_en: A new poll suggests the Progress Party may now be as large as or larger than Labour among LO members, though the sample is small and uncertain. The article centers on Sylvi Listhaug’s attack on the close ties between LO and Labour and on how this could affect the 2025 election.
justification: The article is primarily about party competition, polling, and the political relationship between LO and Labour, while secondarily invoking cost-of-living grievances such as fuel and electricity prices.

headline_no: Mistanken omstraffbart forhold er svekket
headline_en: Suspicion of criminal conduct has weakened
lead_en: Police say suspicion of a criminal offense has weakened after questioning a woman found severely hypothermic near a dead man in snowy woodland on Hadeland. The case began after both of their mobile phones sent automatic emergency alerts, and investigators are still trying to determine what happened.
justification: The article is a domestic crime and police investigation story that does not fit the specified election issue categories.

section_no: Nyheter | « Landet Som Ble For Rikt»
headline_no: SSB avviser blankt at det er oppblåste tall i statistikken
headline_en: Statistics Norway flatly rejects claims that the figures are inflated
lead_en: Statistics Norway rejects author and economist Martin Bech Holte’s claim that Norwegian GDP and productivity figures are artificially inflated by oil money and subsidies. SSB argues that Norway uses the same internationally standardized methods as other countries and that the data do not support his conclusions.
justification: The article is primarily about economic measurement, productivity, and the performance of the Norwegian economy, with a secondary governance angle related to public-sector statistics and state spending.

headline_no: Flere og flere journalister blir drept eller truet
headline_en: More and more journalists are being killed or threatened
lead_en: The article describes growing threats, violence, and killings targeting journalists around the world, while also highlighting serious threats against Norwegian VG journalist Rolf J. Widerøe. Editors warn that strong independent media are essential if journalism is not to be silenced by intimidation.
justification: The article is primarily about press freedom and threats against journalists, which falls outside the main election issue categories, with a secondary governance dimension related to democratic institutions and rule of law.

headline_no: Fiskere fortviler over nytt forslag
headline_en: Fishermen despair over new proposal
lead_en: The Norwegian government has proposed unusually strict fishing restrictions in the Oslo Fjord to restore marine life, including total fishing bans in three large areas. Shrimp trawler operators warn that the measures could destroy their livelihoods and shut down key local fishing activity.
justification: The article is primarily about environmental protection and ecosystem recovery in the Oslo Fjord, with a secondary economic dimension because the proposed fishing bans threaten jobs and livelihoods.

headline_no: Sonet 30 dager for sivil ulydighet. Nå vil han bli Sv-nestleder.
headline_en: Served 30 days for civil disobedience. Now he wants to become SV deputy leader.
lead_en: Lars Haltbrekken, SV’s most prominent climate and environment profile, says he wants to join the party leadership as deputy leader. The article focuses on his candidacy, his position inside the party, and how he could strengthen SV’s green voice at the top.
justification: The article is primarily about an internal leadership contest and positioning within SV, with a secondary climate-policy dimension because Haltbrekken is framed mainly through his environmental profile.

headline_no: Kunder føler seg lurt av Kiwi-kampanje
headline_en: Customers feel misled by Kiwi campaign
lead_en: Aftenposten found that many of Kiwi’s advertised “discounted” healthy products had previous prices higher than the current prices of the same items at Meny. Customers and the Consumer Council say this makes the campaign look misleading, even though Kiwi says it follows the rules.
justification: The article is primarily about grocery prices, consumer purchasing power, and potentially misleading discount practices, with a secondary consumer-protection angle outside the main issue categories.

headline_no: Fikk melding om at en person var skutt
headline_en: Received a report that a person had been shot
lead_en: Police in Lillestrøm responded to a report that someone had been shot and cordoned off part of the town center. They later found the alleged victim unharmed, arrested one person, and said the incident appears linked to a criminal milieu and likely involved a gas weapon.
justification: The article is primarily about violent crime and public safety, which fits the crime dimension of the immigration/integration/crime category, with a secondary general domestic-news aspect.

headline_no: Bøllete selvopptatthet gjør ikke Amerika stort
headline_en: Bullying self-absorption does not make America great
lead_en: Donald Trump’s inauguration speech and first executive orders show, according to the article, a worrying lack of historical understanding and respect for international cooperation. The piece argues that this is troubling for allies such as Norway.
justification: The article is primarily about U.S. foreign policy, NATO, and international cooperation, and explicitly discusses the implications for Norway’s security as a small allied state.

headline_no: Blokkdelingen av Europa kommer tilbake. Verre kan det bli.
headline_en: Europe’s bloc division is returning. It could get worse.
lead_en: The article argues that Vladimir Putin is expanding Russian influence across Europe by backing autocrats and spreading disinformation more successfully than many in the West realize. It notes that Norway is relatively resilient, but not immune.
justification: The article is primarily about Russian influence, European security, and the risk of renewed bloc politics, with a secondary focus on democratic resilience and governance.

section_no: Nyheter | Nyheter | Donald Trumps Andre Periode
headline_no: 13 ting Trump gjorde på sin første dag som president
headline_en: 13 things Trump did on his first day as president
lead_en: Donald Trump signed a large number of executive orders on his first day back in office, alongside granting pardons related to the January 6 Capitol attack. The measures covered climate, immigration, inflation, energy, federal staffing, TikTok, and gender policy.
justification: The article is primarily a roundup of Trump’s first-day governing actions and executive decisions, with governance as the dominant frame and foreign/security policy only one part of the package.

headline_no: Det Elon Musk gjorde etterpå, er enda farligere
headline_en: What Elon Musk did afterward is even more dangerous
lead_en: The article argues that while Elon Musk’s apparent Nazi-like salute drew attention, the more important issue is his growing political power inside the Trump administration. It warns that this could affect democratic institutions in the U.S. and beyond, including Europe and Norway.
justification: The article is primarily about political power, democratic governance, and Musk’s influence inside the U.S. state, with a secondary foreign-policy dimension through his impact on Europe and democratic processes.

headline_no: – At USA ønsker å trekke seg ut av WHO, skaper utfordringer
headline_en: “The fact that the U.S. wants to withdraw from the WHO creates challenges”
lead_en: Trump began the process of withdrawing the United States from the World Health Organization, raising fears about weaker global disease control and pandemic preparedness. Norway’s health minister says the move creates challenges for Norway and international health cooperation.
justification: The article is primarily about global health governance and public health preparedness, with Norway’s Labour health minister presented as defending international cooperation and Norwegian health security.

headline_no: Tar første skritt mot global handelskrig
headline_en: Takes the first step toward a global trade war
lead_en: Donald Trump has ordered his administration to prepare retaliatory measures against countries that impose extra taxes on American multinationals. The move also signals a U.S. withdrawal from the OECD global tax agreement and could trigger wider economic confrontation.
justification: The article is primarily about international corporate taxation and the OECD minimum tax regime, with a secondary economic dimension due to the risk of a broader trade conflict.

headline_no: Politiet med storsatsing for å ta kriminelle gjenger og nettverk
headline_en: Police launch major push to take down criminal gangs and networks
lead_en: Norwegian police have received an extra NOK 600 million to intensify efforts against criminal gangs and networks. The article describes threats from local groups and foreign-based actors, with a focus on drugs, violence, fraud, and cross-border organized crime affecting Oslo.
justification: The article is primarily about gang crime, organized criminal networks, violence, and policing in Norway, which fits the immigration/integration/crime category, with governance as a secondary aspect through police strategy and state response.

headline_no: Bompenger er blitt god butikk for taxieiere
headline_en: Toll charges have become good business for taxi owners
lead_en: Several Oslo taxi companies are charging passengers more in toll fees than taxi owners actually pay, and in some cases they charge even when no toll road is used. The article raises consumer protection concerns about misleading pricing practices.
justification: The article is primarily about consumer costs, pricing practices, and financial burdens in everyday transport, making cost-of-living/economy the best fit.

headline_no: Tangen advarermot kortsiktig jag
headline_en: Tangen warns against short-termism
lead_en: Nicolai Tangen argues that quarterly reporting drives short-term thinking, wastes resources, and pushes companies away from the stock market. He says firms should report results every six months instead to encourage longer-term decisions.
justification: The article is primarily about financial markets, corporate reporting, and broader economic incentives, making economy the dominant issue.

headline_no: Trump gir EU et spark bak
headline_en: Trump gives the EU a kick from behind
lead_en: The article argues that Trump’s return may push Europe to move faster on overdue changes in trade, defence, and economic policy. It also notes implications for Norway through Europe’s security role and trade relations.
justification: The article is primarily about Europe’s strategic response to Trump on security, NATO, and its global role, with a secondary focus on trade and economic reform.

headline_no: Les også
headline_en: Read also
lead_en: Norwegian business leaders in Davos do not appear overly alarmed by Donald Trump’s return to power, though they expect uncertainty around trade, inflation, and interest rates. Several argue that Trump’s policies could also pressure Europe to become more competitive.
justification: The article is primarily about economic expectations among Norwegian business leaders regarding Trump, especially trade, competitiveness, inflation, and interest rates, with a secondary geopolitical dimension.

headline_no: – Oljeboring her er galskap
headline_en: “Oil drilling here is madness”
lead_en: After the government awarded 53 new exploration licenses on the Norwegian shelf, critics reacted strongly to one license in the environmentally sensitive Træna Reef area. SV and environmental groups argue that the decision breaks both the management plan for Norwegian sea areas and the government’s own platform.
justification: The article is primarily about oil drilling in a vulnerable marine environment and the conflict with environmental protections, while secondarily criticizing the Labour-led government’s handling of the issue.

headline_no: Mann fra Skien må for retten etter blodig angrep i Paris i 1982
headline_en: Man from Skien must stand trial after bloody attack in Paris in 1982
lead_en: A Norwegian citizen from Skien is accused of involvement in the 1982 terrorist attack on the Jewish restaurant Goldenberg in Paris, where six people were killed. The article argues that even after 43 years, it is important that the French justice system delivers a verdict.
justification: The article is primarily about terrorism, political violence, and the state’s response through the justice system, which fits the security category.

headline_no: Flyktninger var opptatt av mye mer enn penger da de valgte Norge
headline_en: Refugees cared about much more than money when they chose Norway
lead_en: A survey of Ukrainian refugees in Norway shows that many chose the country not mainly for financial reasons, but because of safety, nature, culture, and trust in Norwegian society. The article suggests these factors may support integration but could also reduce willingness to return to Ukraine.
justification: The article is primarily about refugees’ motivations for choosing Norway and their integration into Norwegian society, which fits the immigration/integration category.

headline_no: Kommunen smadrer Obos' endring
headline_en: The municipality tears apart Obos’ redesign
lead_en: Oslo’s planning authorities have rejected Obos’ revised high-rise project at Vollebekk, saying it has too low architectural quality and does not meet legal and planning standards. Neighbors who have opposed the project now have strong backing from the municipality.
justification: The article is primarily about a local urban development and housing project, with governance as a secondary issue because municipal planning authorities are rejecting the proposal on regulatory and quality grounds.

headline_no: Ble mistet fra hangarskip
headline_en: Lost from an aircraft carrier
lead_en: Hundreds of plastic cereal cups washed up along the Norwegian coast after the U.S. Navy admitted losing several supply pallets in the North Sea during a replenishment operation. Environmental groups say the Navy must now take responsibility for cleaning up the pollution.
justification: The article is primarily about marine pollution and environmental cleanup on the Norwegian coast, with a secondary security dimension because the waste came from a U.S. naval operation.

headline_no: Hvem er best til å stille diagnose? Vi lot legen prøve seg mot CHATGPT.
headline_en: Who is better at making a diagnosis? We let a doctor compete against ChatGPT.
lead_en: The article tests whether ChatGPT can diagnose medical cases better than a Norwegian doctor, drawing on new research suggesting AI may outperform physicians on diagnostic tasks. In the head-to-head contest, ChatGPT beats the doctor, though the piece stresses that AI cannot replace human medical judgment.
justification: The article is primarily about medical diagnosis and healthcare, focusing on whether AI can improve or outperform doctors in assessing patient symptoms.

headline_no: Fylkesordførere skal ikke be statsråder holde kjeft
headline_en: County mayors should not tell cabinet ministers to shut up
lead_en: An appeal from county politicians asks government ministers to stop speaking disrespectfully about matters outside their mandate. The editorial argues that ministers must be free to speak openly about county politics, even if they should keep a civil tone.
justification: The article is primarily about political conduct, institutional boundaries, and criticism of Labour county politicians’ handling of a conflict with a minister, which fits governance and leadership.

headline_no: Det er dumt å sove lite. Men hva er lang nok søvn?
headline_en: Sleeping too little is bad. But what counts as enough sleep?
lead_en: The article discusses how poor sleep harms health and questions the old idea that adults must sleep exactly eight hours. It argues that sleep needs vary and reflects on whether sleep trackers actually help people rest better.
justification: The article is primarily about sleep, health, and public health guidance, which falls under health and welfare rather than electoral or political leadership issues.

headline_no: Føkk – ny ordliste! Nå kan du gønne på med nyord som ruler.
headline_en: Fuck – a new dictionary! Now you can go all in with new words that rule.
lead_en: Norway’s updated dictionaries now include hundreds of newer and often English-derived words in normalized Norwegian spelling. The article presents this as a major modernization of Bokmål and Nynorsk to reflect contemporary language use.
justification: The article is about language reform and dictionary updates rather than any of the core political issue categories, so it fits Other.

headline_no: Har EU en spion i egne rekker?
headline_en: Does the EU have a spy in its own ranks?
lead_en: EU politicians debated allegations that Hungary spied on EU anti-fraud investigators and other EU visitors. The case has raised concerns about espionage by an EU member state against EU institutions.
justification: The article is primarily about espionage, intelligence threats, and security inside the EU, with a secondary governance angle related to corruption and institutional accountability.

headline_no: Elitesoldater skal stoppe russerne fra underjordisk by
headline_en: Elite soldiers are to stop the Russians from an underground city
lead_en: The article describes Azov’s vast underground headquarters near the front and uses it to explore growing criticism of Ukraine’s military leadership. Its main focus is what must change in the army to halt Russia’s advance.
justification: The article is primarily about the war in Ukraine, military capacity, and stopping Russian advances, making security and defence the dominant issue, with a secondary governance angle about leadership failures in the army.

headline_no: Energi og EU har kraft til å sprenge regjeringen
headline_en: Energy and the EU have the power to blow up the government
lead_en: The article explains how the EU’s energy package has reopened deep tensions between Labour and the Centre Party over energy policy and Norway’s relationship with the EU. The dispute is serious enough to trigger talk of a government crisis.
justification: The primary focus is on coalition conflict, cabinet stability, and whether the energy dispute could break up the government, which makes governance the dominant issue, with a secondary economic/energy policy dimension.

headline_no: Giske mener Sp har feil fokus og støtter Støre
headline_en: Giske says the Centre Party is focusing on the wrong thing and backs Støre
lead_en: Trond Giske argues that the real battle is over foreign electricity links and ACER, not the less controversial EU energy directives now under discussion. The article centers on how the dispute could split the government and how Labour and the Centre Party are positioning themselves.
justification: The article is primarily about government stability, intra-coalition conflict, and Støre’s leadership in handling the EU energy dispute, with a secondary focus on electricity prices and energy policy.

headline_no: Sykepleieren tjener ikke nok til å komme inn på boligmarkedet
headline_en: The nurse does not earn enough to enter the housing market
lead_en: A new housing affordability index shows that a single nurse on an average salary can afford only a tiny share of homes in Oslo and nearby areas. The article highlights how young nurses struggle to save and buy despite steady work and wage growth.
justification: The article is primarily about affordability, wages, and housing market pressure facing ordinary earners, which fits the economy/cost-of-living category, with a secondary link to health because the case centers on a nurse.

headline_no: Venter «svært sterk» boligprisvekst
headline_en: Expects “very strong” housing price growth
lead_en: Nordea Markets expects Norwegian house prices to rise sharply in 2025, even with only two rate cuts. The forecast is tied to strong wage growth, looser borrowing conditions, and limited housing supply.
justification: The article is primarily about housing prices, interest rates, purchasing power, and the broader Norwegian economy, which fits the economy/cost-of-living category.

headline_no: Klarer ikke finne nok verktøy til å fikse Norges klimaløfter
headline_en: Unable to find enough tools to fix Norway’s climate pledges
lead_en: A new analysis from the Norwegian Environment Agency says the government cannot meet Norway’s 2030 climate commitments with currently available measures alone. Even with aggressive action, the state may need costly biofuels or quota purchases to close the gap.
justification: The article is primarily about Norway’s climate policy shortfalls and the difficulty of meeting emissions targets, with a secondary governance angle because it criticizes the government’s implementation capacity.

headline_no: Joacim Lund: Forfengelighet bør ikke behandles med slankemedisiner. Det kan godt fastlegene notere seg.
headline_en: Joacim Lund: Vanity should not be treated with weight-loss drugs. GPs would do well to note that.
lead_en: The commentary argues that weight-loss drugs can be important for patients with severe obesity, but they are increasingly being used by people who only want to lose a few kilos. It says doctors should not prescribe them for cosmetic reasons and stresses that medication alone is not a cure.
justification: The article is primarily about medical treatment, prescribing practices, obesity, and public health, which places it in the health category.

headline_no: Dette lærte vi av Trumps første dag om de neste fire årene
headline_en: What Trump’s first day taught us about the next four years
lead_en: The article argues that Trump’s first day back in office showed he intends to govern aggressively, provocatively, and on his own terms. It highlights his polarizing rhetoric, sweeping pardons, and strong focus on pleasing core supporters.
justification: The article is primarily about the direction of U.S. leadership and international implications under Trump, which fits security/foreign policy, with a secondary governance angle about his governing style and executive power.

headline_no: To «kuttministere» ble til én
headline_en: Two “cut ministers” became one
lead_en: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy were both supposed to lead Trump’s government-cutting initiative, but a power struggle appears to have left Musk in sole charge. The article focuses on internal competition over influence and priorities in the new administration.
justification: The article is primarily about leadership, power struggles, and the organization of the Trump administration, with a secondary economic angle because the dispute concerns public spending cuts.

headline_no: Sparkes for manglende MAGA-visjoner
headline_en: Fired for lacking MAGA visions
lead_en: Trump is moving quickly to purge officials he sees as disloyal and to tighten political control over the U.S. state apparatus. The article says tens of thousands of federal employees could ultimately be at risk.
justification: The article is primarily about executive control, politicization of the bureaucracy, and leadership over the state apparatus, which fits governance and leadership.

headline_no: Aker vil få opp farten i det grønne skiftet igjen
headline_en: Aker wants to speed up the green transition again
lead_en: After years of limited visible progress, Aker’s green investment vehicle says it expects to present its first project in the first half of the year. The article focuses on renewed efforts to invest in Nordic green industry and emissions cuts.
justification: The article is primarily about green industrial investment and efforts to accelerate emissions reductions, which fits climate policy, with a secondary economic dimension tied to investment strategy and business performance.

headline_no: Tangen er imponert over en «frue» i Paris
headline_en: Tangen is impressed by a “lady” in Paris
lead_en: Norway’s sovereign wealth fund chief Nicolai Tangen praised the rapid rebuilding of Notre-Dame as proof that Europe can achieve more with fewer rules. He also noted that climate change matters financially because it can weaken productivity and investment returns.
justification: The article is primarily about economic performance, regulation, and the sovereign wealth fund’s perspective on growth and investment, with a secondary climate angle tied to financial risk.

headline_no: Schibsted Media kutter rundt 350 årsverk
headline_en: Schibsted Media is cutting around 350 full-time positions
lead_en: Schibsted Media has announced plans to reduce its workforce by about 350 positions in 2025 after weak growth in advertising and subscription revenues. The company says the cuts are needed to secure high-quality journalism and strengthen its competitiveness.
justification: The article is primarily about company downsizing, revenues, and economic pressure in the media industry, which fits the economy category.

headline_no: Ser utlendinger på høylys dag
headline_en: Seeing foreigners in broad daylight
lead_en: In Jessheim, skin color has become a heated issue after a parent complained that many pupils with minority backgrounds were placed in the same class. With help from OMOD, the case was brought before the Anti-Discrimination Tribunal.
justification: The article is primarily about immigrant background, discrimination, and integration in school class composition, with a secondary link to education/public services.

headline_no: Hvordan kan en fred sikres i Ukraina?
headline_en: How can peace be secured in Ukraine?
lead_en: Jens Stoltenberg argues that the most credible way to secure a future peace in Ukraine is NATO membership once the fighting stops. The article discusses Ukraine’s demand for binding security guarantees after repeated Russian violations of past agreements.
justification: The article is primarily about security guarantees, NATO, and the conditions for a durable peace in Ukraine, while also presenting Stoltenberg in a competent and authoritative role.

section_no: Nyheter | Nyheter | Donald Trumps Andre Periode
headline_no: Biskopen kom på kant med Trump: – Sier ikke unnskyld
headline_en: The bishop clashed with Trump: “Not apologizing”
lead_en: Bishop Mariann Edgar Budde says she will not apologize after urging Donald Trump to show mercy toward LGBTQ children and undocumented immigrants during a church service in Washington. Trump responded by attacking her and demanding an apology.
justification: The article’s main substantive issue is immigration, as the central conflict concerns Trump’s treatment of undocumented immigrants, with a secondary cultural dimension around LGBTQ rights and public rhetoric.

headline_no: Plutselig sto en «norsk» biskop foran Donald Trump
headline_en: Suddenly a “Norwegian” bishop stood before Donald Trump
lead_en: Bishop Mariann Budde unsettled Donald Trump by urging mercy for immigrants and LGBTQ people, and the article uses the episode to highlight deep divisions within American Christianity. It also draws comparisons to the more liberal tradition of the Church of Norway.
justification: The article is primarily a commentary on religion, political culture, and divisions within U.S. churches, with immigration as a secondary substantive theme.

headline_no: Varsler kamp om transrettigheter
headline_en: Battle over trans rights looms
lead_en: Donald Trump has issued a presidential order declaring that only “man” and “woman” exist in official U.S. policy, stripping rights from trans and non-binary people. LGBTQ organizations are preparing a prolonged legal and political fight against the changes.
justification: The article is primarily about transgender rights and gender policy in the United States, which does not fit the listed election issue categories, with a secondary link to healthcare through gender-affirming treatment.

headline_no: Tre ting Europa kan gjøre for å påvirke Trump
headline_en: Three things Europe can do to influence Trump
lead_en: Jens Stoltenberg argues that Europe should focus on shaping Donald Trump’s choices rather than speculating about them. He highlights higher defence spending, stronger institutions for support to Ukraine, and careful political messaging as the key steps.
justification: The article is primarily about European security, NATO, Ukraine, and relations with the United States, while secondarily presenting Stoltenberg as a credible political leader.

headline_no: Israelsk offensiv i Jenin driver hundrevis av palestinere på flukt
headline_en: Israeli offensive in Jenin drives hundreds of Palestinians to flee
lead_en: Hundreds of Palestinians are fleeing Jenin in the occupied West Bank after the city’s governor said Israel ordered residents to evacuate. The offensive has intensified fears that Jenin could face destruction similar to parts of Gaza.
justification: The article is primarily about Israeli military actions against Palestinians in Jenin within the broader Israel-Palestine conflict, with a secondary security dimension due to the focus on armed operations and militias.

headline_no: Sp får sprikende råd fra sine egne
headline_en: The Centre Party gets conflicting advice from its own ranks
lead_en: The Norwegian government is debating whether to incorporate controversial EU energy directives into Norwegian law, a dispute that could trigger a government crisis. The issue has deepened tensions between Labour and the Centre Party, with some in Sp urging the party to leave government rather than give in.
justification: The article is primarily about energy policy and electricity control/prices, with a secondary focus on coalition conflict and potential government instability in the Støre government.

headline_no: – Redselen for klassisk er i ferd med å slippe taket
headline_en: “The fear of the classical is starting to loosen its grip”
lead_en: A proposed Tøyen metro entrance has sparked years of debate in Oslo, with many residents favoring a more classical design. The article presents this as part of a broader international trend toward traditional architectural forms.
justification: The article is primarily about architecture and aesthetic preferences in urban development, which does not fit the main political issue categories provided.

headline_no: Norges Bank: – Trolig setter vi renten ned i mars
headline_en: Norges Bank: “We will probably cut the interest rate in March”
lead_en: Norges Bank kept the policy rate unchanged at 4.5 percent for the ninth meeting in a row, but signaled that a cut is likely in March. The article focuses on inflation, the krone, and economic uncertainty affecting Norwegian rate decisions.
justification: The article is primarily about interest rates, inflation, and household economic conditions in Norway, which fits the cost-of-living and economy category.

headline_no: Ranet Elkjøp i sentrum: Fikk med seg 35 smarttelefoner
headline_en: Robbed Elkjøp in the city center: Got away with 35 smartphones
lead_en: A man in his 20s has been charged after allegedly threatening an Elkjøp employee with a knife and escaping with 35 smartphones worth about NOK 400,000. He is also accused of a second knife robbery in Oslo days later.
justification: The article is a local crime report about armed robbery in Oslo and does not fit the main election issue categories provided.

headline_no: Vil stanse Sverige-flukt med skattelette
headline_en: Wants to stop the flight to Sweden with tax cuts
lead_en: The government plans to ease tax rules for Norwegian investment funds in order to prevent companies from moving operations to Sweden. Finance Minister Trygve Slagsvold Vedum says the changes should remove tax incentives for relocation.
justification: The article is primarily about changing tax rules to improve competitiveness and prevent capital flight, with a secondary economic angle related to business conditions and investment.

headline_no: Sensor: – Vi må seriøst vurdere å slutte med hjemmeeksamen
headline_en: Examiner: “We must seriously consider ending take-home exams”
lead_en: A university examiner says take-home exams may no longer be viable because it is often unclear whether students wrote their papers themselves or used artificial intelligence. The article discusses growing concern over AI cheating and how universities should adapt assessment methods.
justification: The article is primarily about higher education and the functioning of public educational institutions, with a secondary technology/AI dimension that falls outside the main issue categories.

headline_no: Oslo kommune selger stor eiendom på Dikemark i Asker
headline_en: Oslo municipality is selling a large property at Dikemark in Asker
lead_en: Oslo municipality has put a 70-decare property in Dikemark up for sale and hopes a private buyer will take over and develop the area. The site could become part of a broader housing and local center expansion in Asker.
justification: The article is primarily about public land linked to former hospital property and municipal service assets, with a secondary urban development dimension outside the main issue categories.

headline_no: Maud Angelica Behn: – Sorg er med deg hele livet
headline_en: Maud Angelica Behn: “Grief stays with you for life”
lead_en: Maud Angelica Behn reflects on grief, mental health, and losing her father to suicide five years ago. She describes how sorrow changes form over time and urges people who are struggling to seek help.
justification: The article is primarily about mental health, grief, and help-seeking, which fits the health and welfare category.

headline_no: Prinsen var med på oppdrag i skibakken
headline_en: The prince took part in an assignment on the ski slope
lead_en: Prince Sverre Magnus joined Crown Prince Haakon and Crown Princess Mette-Marit on a visit to a sports club in Lommedalen. The article focuses on whether the royal household should make greater use of the younger royals in official public duties.
justification: The article is about the Norwegian royal family’s public role and staffing, which does not fit the main election issue categories provided.

headline_no: Laveste byggeaktivitet siden 1946
headline_en: Lowest level of construction activity since 1946
lead_en: Norway’s new-home market remains extremely weak, with housing starts in 2024 at their lowest level since 1946 according to industry figures. The article links the slump to high building costs, interest rates, and a severe housing shortfall.
justification: The article is primarily about economic conditions affecting housing construction, interest rates, and affordability, with a secondary public-services/welfare dimension because the housing shortage is framed as a broad social problem.

headline_no: Nei, hjemmefødsel bør ikke bli et offentlig tilbud
headline_en: No, home birth should not become a public service
lead_en: Some women want to give birth at home, but planned home births remain a very marginal phenomenon in Norway. The editorial argues that creating a publicly funded assisted home-birth service would be a bad use of scarce midwife and health resources.
justification: The article is primarily about maternity care, healthcare resource allocation, and how public birth services should be organized in Norway.

headline_no: Slik var dramaet i regjeringen
headline_en: This is how the drama unfolded in the government
lead_en: The article describes the escalating conflict inside the Norwegian government over EU energy directives, which could push the Centre Party out of the coalition. It argues that the dispute is fundamentally about governing capacity, coalition survival, and Norway’s relationship with Europe.
justification: The primary focus is on coalition conflict, government stability, and leadership around whether Sp will leave the government, with a secondary foreign-policy/EU energy dimension.

headline_no: 78-åringen jobber ute året rundt
headline_en: The 78-year-old works outdoors all year round
lead_en: The article uses a 78-year-old electrician as an example in the debate over how long Norwegians should remain in working life. It focuses on proposals to raise or lower the retirement-age rules and on employers’ need for experienced labor.
justification: The article is mainly about retirement age, pensions, and labor-force participation as part of welfare and public-service policy, with a secondary economic dimension linked to labor shortages.

headline_no: Slik var dramaet i regjeringen
headline_en: This is how the drama unfolded in the government
lead_en: The article recounts the escalating dispute between Labour and the Centre Party over EU energy directives, a conflict that could force Sp out of government. Its main focus is the coalition crisis and what it means for government stability in Norway.
justification: The dominant theme is government leadership, coalition conflict, and possible cabinet breakup, with a secondary issue of Norway’s EU and energy-policy relationship.

headline_no: Slik var det interne dramaet om saken som kan sprenge regjeringen
headline_en: This is how the internal drama unfolded over the issue that could blow up the government
lead_en: The article reports on the closed-door internal conflict between Jonas Gahr Støre and Trygve Slagsvold Vedum over introducing parts of the EU clean energy package. It centers on how the dispute could trigger a government crisis and force the Centre Party out of office.
justification: The main focus is the internal government crisis, coalition management, and possible cabinet breakup, with a secondary issue of Norway’s EU and energy-policy relationship.

headline_no: Han eier en rekke praktbygg i Oslo. Nå vil han ha mer.
headline_en: He owns a long list of landmark buildings in Oslo. Now he wants more.
lead_en: The article profiles investor Christian Ringnes and his extensive property holdings in Oslo, including his purchase of Tryvannstårnet. It also describes his plans for further redevelopment, especially in Alnabru.
justification: The article is primarily a business and city-development profile about private real-estate ownership and urban transformation in Oslo, which does not fit the main election issue categories.

headline_no: Nå er dette tilbake på moten
headline_en: Now this is back in fashion
lead_en: The commentary argues that wearing old fur coats again is preferable to throwing them away and buying new clothing. It frames second-hand fur as more sensible from a climate and waste perspective, even while supporting the ban on fur farming in Norway.
justification: The article primarily discusses consumption, reuse, and environmental impacts from clothing production, with a secondary lifestyle and animal-welfare dimension.

headline_no: Neseblodig alvor i Indre Troms
headline_en: Bloody serious in Inner Troms
lead_en: The article reports on repeated nosebleeds among soldiers in Skjold camp and other military camps in Troms. Researchers suggest the likely explanation is the cold, very dry winter air rather than a unique local health hazard.
justification: The article is primarily about conditions within Norway’s military camps and defence sector, with a secondary health dimension related to soldiers’ symptoms.

headline_no: Arbeiderne plukket jordbær. Han plukket av lønnen deres.
headline_en: The workers picked strawberries. He skimmed off their wages.
lead_en: The investigation alleges that Vietnamese seasonal workers in Norwegian agriculture were exploited through wage deductions, poor housing, and tight control by hidden middlemen. It focuses on how convicted recruiter Hieu Le has continued operating in the sector despite past police action.
justification: The article is primarily an investigative report on labor exploitation and abusive recruitment practices in Norwegian agriculture, which does not fit the main election issue categories, with a secondary economic aspect related to wages and working conditions.

headline_no: Byrådet vil ikke svare på om eller når billettprisene skal ned
headline_en: The city government will not answer whether or when ticket prices will go down
lead_en: The article reports that Ruter ticket prices in Oslo are rising again, even though the city government had promised to work toward cutting the monthly pass to 499 kroner. It focuses on political accountability and whether the governing coalition is delivering on its transport price pledge.
justification: The main focus is on political promises, governing credibility, and whether the Oslo city government is following through, with a secondary cost-of-living aspect tied to public transport prices.

headline_no: DNB henter milliarder i utlandet som EU-landene gjerne vil ha
headline_en: DNB raises billions abroad that EU countries would like to keep for themselves
lead_en: DNB’s chief executive warns that Europe’s growing need for capital for defence, green transition, digitalization, and Ukraine reconstruction will intensify competition for investment. The article focuses on how this could make it harder for Norwegian banks and businesses to access foreign capital.
justification: The article is primarily about access to capital, competitiveness, and financing for Norwegian businesses, with a secondary security dimension tied to European defence and Ukraine-related investment needs.

headline_no: Frankrike vil være en bro mellom Norge og EU
headline_en: France wants to be a bridge between Norway and the EU
lead_en: The article examines Norway’s search for new frigates and a long-term strategic defence partner, highlighting France’s bid for closer military cooperation. Its main focus is Norway’s security policy, alliance choices, and the broader Russian threat in Europe.
justification: The article is primarily about defence cooperation, military procurement, and Norway’s strategic security relationship with European allies.

headline_no: Landet som ikke finnes, håper på Trump
headline_en: The country that does not exist hopes for Trump
lead_en: The article explains why Somaliland’s new president hopes Donald Trump or conservative allies in Washington might support recognition of Somaliland as an independent state. It focuses on geopolitics in the Horn of Africa, including U.S., Ethiopian, and Somali interests.
justification: The article is primarily about international recognition, strategic geography, and regional security dynamics in the Horn of Africa.

headline_no: Å hive profitten ut av barnevernet har vært en komplett fadese
headline_en: Throwing profit out of child welfare has been a complete fiasco
lead_en: The commentary argues that the government’s attempt to phase out commercial providers in child welfare has failed badly. It says the policy has increased costs, weakened capacity, and left vulnerable children without the care they are entitled to.
justification: The article is primarily about child welfare services and the provision of public care, while secondarily criticizing the government’s competence and management of the sector.

headline_no: Har satt i gang hevnaksjoner
headline_en: Has set revenge actions in motion
lead_en: The article argues that Donald Trump has begun using his return to the presidency to pursue revenge against perceived enemies in the justice system, politics, and bureaucracy. It focuses on his pardons, investigations, and moves against officials tied to past cases against him.
justification: The article is primarily about political leadership, abuse of power, and the functioning of democratic institutions under Trump rather than a specific policy domain.

headline_no: Mann tiltalt for to drap i Porsgrunn
headline_en: Man charged with two murders in Porsgrunn
lead_en: The article reports that a 39-year-old man has been charged with murdering his girlfriend by setting her on fire and later killing a key witness in Porsgrunn. It also outlines additional charges including violence, threats, sexual offences, and obstruction of justice.
justification: The article is primarily a crime and court report about two murder charges and related violent offences, which does not fit the main election issue categories.

headline_no: Bærum-søstrene terrordømt: – Dro til Syria for å delta i IS
headline_en: The Bærum sisters convicted on terror charges: “They went to Syria to take part in ISIS”
lead_en: The article reports that two sisters from Bærum were convicted and sentenced to four and two years in prison for participating in ISIS in Syria. The court rejected their claim that they had traveled to do humanitarian work and found that they had supported the terror group’s ideology and activities.
justification: The article is primarily about terrorism, national security, and participation in an extremist organization linked to international conflict.

headline_no: Norge inngår utleveringsavtale med Emiratene
headline_en: Norway enters into an extradition agreement with the Emirates
lead_en: The article reports that Norway will sign agreements with the United Arab Emirates on extradition and legal cooperation in criminal cases. It highlights the government’s effort to strengthen cross-border crime enforcement against suspects based in the Emirates.
justification: The article is primarily about international legal and security cooperation to combat cross-border crime, with a secondary governance aspect related to the government’s justice policy.

headline_no: Forsinkelser for P-8 Poseidon og Evenes
headline_en: Delays for the P-8 Poseidon and Evenes
lead_en: The article reports that Norway’s P-8 Poseidon fleet and the development of Evenes air station are delayed, meaning full operational capability will come later than planned. It focuses on military readiness, personnel shortages, and closer defence cooperation with the United Kingdom.
justification: The article is primarily about defence capability, military preparedness, and operational delays in Norway’s armed forces, with a secondary governance aspect related to implementation and planning.

headline_no: Slik får du krydderurtene fra butikken til å leve lenger
headline_en: How to make store-bought herbs last longer
lead_en: The article gives practical advice on how to keep supermarket herbs alive longer by repotting them, giving them enough light, and watering them properly. It also includes tips on storing cut herbs and propagating basil from cuttings.
justification: The article is a lifestyle and gardening advice piece about caring for kitchen herbs, which does not fit the main election issue categories.

headline_no: Det finnes ikke noe Nrkprogram som heter «Da vi ikke styrte landet»
headline_en: There is no NRK program called “When We Didn’t Govern the Country”
lead_en: If voluntarily giving up government power were such a clever move, Thorbjørn Jagland would be the greatest political tactician of the past 40 years. The article argues that leaving government may offer tactical freedom, but governing power is far more valuable.
justification: The piece is primarily about government stability, coalition breakdown, and the strategic costs and benefits of leaving office, with energy policy and electricity prices as a secondary backdrop.

headline_no: Dag-inge Ulstein er ny Krf-leder. Han vil ikke bli en overgangsfigur.
headline_en: Dag-Inge Ulstein is the new KrF leader. He does not want to be a transitional figure.
lead_en: Dag-Inge Ulstein says he is more motivated than he has been in a long time after being elected KrF leader. At the same time, the party is refreshing its profile with a new slogan, logo, and sharper political priorities.
justification: The article is mainly about party leadership change, party branding, electoral positioning, and possible coalition implications, which makes governance and political leadership the primary issue.

headline_no: – Det kunne aldri funket for meg å føde hjemme
headline_en: “Giving birth at home could never have worked for me”
lead_en: Therese Rindal says she had a wonderful hospital birth, but not all women do. A new survey may provide answers about how women experience maternity and childbirth care in Norway.
justification: The article is primarily about maternity care, hospital births, patient trust, and the quality of public health services, which places it squarely in health and welfare.

headline_no: Senterpartiet viker ikke: – Stortingsgruppen samlet mot Eu-pakken
headline_en: Centre Party does not budge: “The parliamentary group is united against the EU package”
lead_en: The Centre Party says there is no room for compromise with Labour over the EU’s fourth energy market package. The dispute could trigger a government crisis and leave Labour governing alone before the autumn election.
justification: The article centers on the EU energy package, national control over electricity, and stable power prices, while the risk of a government breakdown is a secondary governance dimension.

section_no: Nyheter | Israel Og Hamas I Krig
headline_no: Fire israelske soldater og 200 palestinske fanger løslatt
headline_en: Four Israeli soldiers and 200 Palestinian prisoners released
lead_en: Four female Israeli soldiers and 200 Palestinian prisoners were freed in a prisoner exchange between Israel and Hamas under the ceasefire agreement. The exchange was the second so far since the truce took effect.
justification: The article is primarily about the Gaza war and a hostage-prisoner exchange between Israel and Hamas, with a secondary broader conflict and security dimension.

headline_no: Fire israelske soldater og 200 palestinske fanger løslatt
headline_en: Four Israeli soldiers and 200 Palestinian prisoners released
lead_en: Four female Israeli soldiers and 200 Palestinian prisoners were freed in a prisoner exchange between Israel and Hamas under the ceasefire agreement. The swap was the second carried out since the truce took effect.
justification: Despite the section mismatch, the article’s headline and main reported event concern the Gaza war and a hostage-prisoner exchange between Israel and Hamas, with a secondary security/conflict dimension.

headline_no: Gigantisfjell kan true pingviner på Sør-Georgia
headline_en: Giant iceberg could threaten penguins on South Georgia
lead_en: The world’s largest iceberg is drifting toward South Georgia and may threaten important breeding grounds for penguins and seals. Researchers say it could run aground near the island within weeks.
justification: The article is primarily about an environmental threat to wildlife and ecosystems caused by a massive iceberg, which fits climate and environment.

headline_no: Kontoen var alltid tom lenge før lønning. Da fant hun frem kredittkortet.
headline_en: Her account was always empty long before payday. Then she reached for the credit card.
lead_en: Ingeborg Bern realized at 29 how high credit-card interest really was and that she had to change course. She now shares advice with others about personal finance after getting control of her debt.
justification: The article is primarily about personal debt, high interest costs, and household financial management, with a secondary element related to family welfare and parental leave.

headline_no: Hegseth fikk jobben med minst mulig margin
headline_en: Hegseth got the job by the narrowest possible margin
lead_en: Pete Hegseth was confirmed as U.S. defense secretary only after Vice President J.D. Vance cast the tie-breaking vote. The article highlights the unusually fierce opposition and concerns about his qualifications and views on NATO.
justification: The article is primarily about U.S. defense leadership, NATO, Ukraine, and military policy, with a secondary governance element related to Senate confirmation politics.

headline_no: Avis om Trumps samtale med Mette Frederiksen: – Det var forferdelig
headline_en: Newspaper on Trump’s conversation with Mette Frederiksen: “It was terrible”
lead_en: According to the Financial Times, Donald Trump pressed hard in a phone call with Danish Prime Minister Mette Frederiksen about taking over Greenland. Sources described the exchange as confrontational and potentially dangerous.
justification: The article is primarily about international security, Arctic geopolitics, and U.S. foreign policy pressure over Greenland.

headline_no: Kjøpte gullnagle til over 2 millioner
headline_en: Bought a golden spike for more than 2 million
lead_en: A museum and a city in Alaska paid 201,600 dollars to acquire a ceremonial gold spike linked to the completion of the Alaska Railroad in 1923. It will now return to Alaska for permanent public display.
justification: The article is a cultural-historical news item about an auctioned museum object in Alaska and does not fit the main election-related policy categories.

headline_no: Slik finner du klær som varer lenge
headline_en: How to find clothes that last a long time
lead_en: Are your clothes wearing out quickly? With a few simple steps, consumers can make better purchases and choose garments that keep their shape and quality for longer.
justification: The article is mainly a consumer advice piece about clothing quality and durability rather than a core election issue, though it has a secondary sustainability angle.

headline_no: Landet som ble for rikt – og veier ut av problemene
headline_en: The country that became too rich – and ways out of the problems
lead_en: Kristin Clemet argues that Norway’s oil wealth has weakened incentives for work and productivity, and that broad reforms are needed to strengthen the economy and the welfare state.
justification: The article is primarily about Norway’s economic model, public spending, productivity, and reform proposals, with taxation as a clear secondary theme.

headline_no: Støre kan ikke snu nå
headline_en: Støre cannot back down now
lead_en: The commentary argues that Jonas Gahr Støre has committed himself too strongly to supporting EU energy directives, leaving it to the Centre Party to decide whether to stay in government.
justification: The article is primarily about government stability, coalition conflict, and Støre’s leadership in a dispute over EU directives, with energy policy as a secondary issue.

headline_no: LO mener at Vedum kunne løst krangelen
headline_en: LO believes Vedum could have resolved the dispute
lead_en: As fears of a government crisis grow, LO backs Støre’s line on the EU energy package and argues that Finance Minister Trygve Slagsvold Vedum could have helped solve the conflict.
justification: The article is primarily about coalition conflict, government stability, and Labour’s handling of the dispute over EU energy directives, with energy policy as a secondary issue.

headline_no: Første valgkamp utenmoren
headline_en: First election campaign without her mother
lead_en: SV leader Kirsti Bergstø enters her first parliamentary election campaign after losing her mother, reflecting on grief, family support, and balancing politics with single motherhood.
justification: The article is primarily a political profile of a party leader in an election year, focusing on leadership and campaign context rather than a specific policy issue.

headline_no: Dette kunne inspektørene ikke stoppe
headline_en: This is what the inspectors could not stop
lead_en: A secret report warns that authorities are unable to stop poor and unsafe housing conditions for seasonal workers when employers claim the workers arranged the accommodation privately.
justification: The article focuses on the exploitation and weak protection of foreign seasonal workers in Norway, combining labor abuse with migration-related vulnerability, while regulatory failure is a secondary issue.

headline_no: Joacim Lund: Sør i Europa er slaverilignende arbeidsforhold i landbruket vanlig. Norge kan stå for tur.
headline_en: Joacim Lund: In southern Europe, slavery-like working conditions in agriculture are common. Norway could be next.
lead_en: The commentator warns that abuse of foreign seasonal farm workers in Norway resembles patterns seen elsewhere in Europe and argues that Norway risks similar labour exploitation if it is not stopped early.
justification: The article focuses on the exploitation of foreign seasonal workers and the risk of migrant labour abuse in Norwegian agriculture, with regulatory failure as a secondary issue.

headline_no: – Ser ut til at enda færre får seg hund eller katt
headline_en: It looks like even fewer people are getting a dog or cat
lead_en: Fewer dogs and cats were microchipped in Norway in 2024, suggesting that pet ownership is declining as people weigh the time and costs involved.
justification: The article is mainly a lifestyle and pet-ownership trend story, which falls outside the main political issue categories, though household costs are a minor secondary element.

headline_no: Mange ønsker et resultat som ikke ser operert ut
headline_en: Many want a result that does not look operated on
lead_en: A plastic surgeon says women seeking breast implants usually have considered it for years and increasingly want smaller, more natural-looking results.
justification: The article is mainly about cosmetic breast surgery, implants, risks, and medical information, so health is the closest fit.

headline_no: Hvilken tidsperiode er det Donald Trump vil tilbake til?
headline_en: Which historical period does Donald Trump want to return to?
lead_en: The article explores which era of U.S. history Trump seems to idealize, pointing to his references to 19th-century expansionism, tariffs, and presidents such as McKinley and Andrew Jackson.
justification: The article is mainly an analysis of Trump’s political symbolism, governing vision, and historical references rather than a specific policy issue, with foreign-policy implications as secondary.

headline_no: Terrordømt kan bli nøkkel til fred
headline_en: Convicted terrorist could become the key to peace
lead_en: Turkey has reopened contact with jailed PKK leader Abdullah Öcalan, raising hopes that he could help restart a peace process with the Kurds after decades of conflict.
justification: The article is primarily about the Kurdish conflict, peace talks, and Turkey’s regional security strategy, with domestic political calculations as a secondary issue.

headline_no: – Jeg tror vi får det
headline_en: “I think we’ll get it”
